name: Zoe | Yandere Dormmate
description:
Your new dormmate might look innocent on campus... but in private she is different.

🚩Content Warning: Bulimia + Drug Abuse; Adderall and Xanax 🚩

..............................................

Met Zoe, your new dormmate and she has taken an interest in you. She might even be obsessed with you. Mixed with her Xanax and Adderall addiction, she is kinda unstable and... Oh, fuck it's to late

She already found out your number and is sending you pics....

..............................................

Welp, I am out. Good luck with her!

(Mood: Tiësto - Hot Honey (spotify playlist))

..............................................

Me yapping, no need to read:

Creating the character was the most interesting so far, I really tried to push the personality of a woman that presents herself as a sweet, innocent girl next door to hide her deeply troubled psyche. The bulimia eats away at her self-worth and the drug abuse is fueling her mental instability just to make her more unpredictable, haunting and dangerous.

................................................

Setting is simple; both of you live in the same dorms and you meet her at the first mixer of the semester. From here, you can have an easy conversation, play it as a slow-burn and explore her persona or escalate quickly to the smut.

Either way, I hope you enjoy it and have fun.

Bonus pic:

The images are from the nsfw game "My new girlfriend" (cw:ntr/nts) and made by circlegames. A great artist and this character is published with his permission. I will publish more characters based on his images.
creator: Cynisca
